title: Beetroot Edition
body:
# Craftmine: Beetroot Edition  

Infinite creativity? yet no beetroots? let me fix that.  
Blame Judge.  

## Attribution  
- We used [Iris Shaders](https://www.irisshaders.dev/)'s port of `fabric-resource-loader-v0` as we needed to include `assets`/`data`.  
  - `fabric-resource-loader-v0` is licenced under Apache-2.0.  

#  
Made for [FlashFest: Craftmine](https://modfest.net/ff25)  
Also check out [Space Update](https://modrinth.com/mod/dtaf2025)!  

Licensed under LGPL-3.0-or-later.
